meta.title: Events
meta.intro: Events keep our Where Winds Meet community consistent: clear start times, goals, and friendly coordination.
badges: RSVP in Discord or the in-game guild event

featured.lead: This month's featured activity is about welcoming members and helping people get stronger for late-game content.
featured.title: Skill building & Mentoring
bullets: When open slots allow, we welcome new members while doing our best to make everyone feel at home in the Mōchirīī family.

upcoming.title: Guild Hero's Realm: Weekly Coordination
upcoming.summary: A relaxed run for the weekly guild hero's realm. Show up, ask questions & we'll do our best to match groups.

recurring.intro: These run on a daily, weekly or monthly basis. Times are confirmed in Discord each week.

items.title: Sect dailies, guild activities, trials, hero realms, and more.
items.summary: Scheduled windows for members to join when possible to form full teams.

participation.title: How to participate
participation.body: All members welcome! RSVP in Discord or the in-game guild event when available. Showing up on time helps leaders form balanced groups & keeps runs smooth for everyone.
